biography.value: Professional city guards - trained, disciplined, paid soldiers who take their duty seriously. Unlike militia (part-timers) or thugs (criminals), these are career guardsmen with years of experience. They know the law, recognize troublemakers, and maintain order. Respect from citizens, feared by criminals. Will show mercy to those who surrender but are hardened enough to use lethal force when necessary. Loyal to their city and fellow guards - won't abandon posts or comrades easily.

system.tactics: Town guards are professional soldiers who patrol cities and enforce laws. They use formation tactics, working in pairs or small groups. When facing threats, they use Defensive Stance to protect citizens while calling for backup. Against dangerous foes, they use Power Attack to end fights quickly before reinforcements arrive. The heater shield provides excellent defense against both melee (Fortune on defense rolls) and ranged attacks (force Misfortune on attackers).
system.attacksNotes:
• Longsword [Combat]: Melee attack (Agi 5 + Melee Combat 4), Reach: 5 ft
    • One-handed:
      • Margin 1: 8 damage
      • Margin 2: 12 damage (8 + 4 Str)
    • Two-handed (versatile):
      • Margin 1: 9 damage
      • Margin 2: 13 damage (9 + 4 Str)
    • With Power Attack (declared before roll): Add 1 to both dice, deal +1d8 damage on hit
system.reactionsNotes:
• Shield Block (requires wielding a shield):
    • Shield Block (from heater shield): [Reaction] once per round, force Misfortune on one ranged attack (up to 60 ft range)
    • Shield Master Negation: Once per combat as [Reaction], completely negate one attack that would hit you
    • Force Reroll: [Reaction] once per round, Attacker must reroll one of their success dice
    • Increase DR: [Reaction] once per round, Gain +2 DR against this attack only

items.name: Longsword, heater shield, chain mail, uniform, manacles, work gloves, work boots
